records.question: Which conferences listed on http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/b/index.html have papers published in the journal Lecture Notes in Computer Science whose homepage is exactly http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/' AND conference.homepage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/b/index.html' AND journal.fullname = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Conference.Id = Paper.ConferenceId
JOIN Journal ON Paper.JournalId = Journal.Id
WHERE Conference.HomePage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/b/index.html'
  AND Journal.FullName = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science'
  AND Journal.HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'
GROUP BY Conference.Id

records.question: Which conferences have papers published in the journal with homepage http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Paper.ConferenceId = Conference.Id
WHERE Paper.JournalId = (
    SELECT Id FROM Journal WHERE HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'
)

records.question: What conferences have the shortname exactly ECLIPSE?

records.question: Which conferences with shortname HAIS and homepage http://hais.pwr.wroc.pl had papers published in 2009 or later in the journal Lecture Notes in Computer Science, whose shortname is LNCS and homepage is http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/' AND journal.shortname = 'LNCS' AND conference.homepage = 'http://hais.pwr.wroc.pl' AND conference.shortname = 'HAIS' AND paper.year >= 2009 AND journal.fullname = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Paper.ConferenceId = Conference.Id
JOIN Journal ON Paper.JournalId = Journal.Id
WHERE Conference.ShortName = 'HAIS'
  AND Conference.HomePage = 'http://hais.pwr.wroc.pl'
  AND Paper.Year >= 2009
  AND Journal.ShortName = 'LNCS'
  AND Journal.HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'
GROUP BY Conference.Id

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname ICMLA and homepage http://www.icmla-conference.org/icmla11/ have papers from the year 2010 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
WHERE conference.homepage = 'http://www.icmla-conference.org/icmla11/' AND conference.shortname = 'ICMLA' AND paper.year >= 2010
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Paper.ConferenceId = Conference.Id
WHERE Conference.ShortName = 'ICMLA'
  AND Conference.HomePage = 'http://www.icmla-conference.org/icmla11/'
  AND Paper.Year >= 2010
GROUP BY Conference.Id
